changes.reason: The global worst charm-pin tail already matched the enabled extended-VWAP rejection signature except for this single boundary: actual ES-VWAP distance 26.69 versus current 26.25. A minimal nudge to 27 tests whether the intended surgical veto can catch the tail without broad VWAP-extension pruning.

expected_effect: Primary expected improvement is lower worst MAE or reduced charm_pin_pullback_long tail exposure while preserving run_029 trade count, net profit, and protected fast extended-VWAP winners. Tradeoff is small loss of profitable delayed high-extension recoveries if the widened veto envelope overlaps clean charm-pin scalps.
label: extended-vwap-tail-boundary-nudge
rationale: Use one surgical-veto family and one parameter only. The best base remains run_029/run_037/run_038/run_040 at $7149.6 net profit, 107 trades, 0.4% drawdown, and -513.4 worst MAE. Latest run_041 did not beat the leader, and broad entry or 1DTE tightening has repeatedly damaged net profit. The strongest actionable clue is the enabled extended-VWAP rejection near-miss: the worst 2026-06-26 charm_pin_pullback_long trade missed only max-vwap-distance by 0.44 points. Prior direct max-rsi-slope nudge hurt score, so this tests the narrower boundary tied to the single global worst tail rather than expanding RSI/pullback thresholds that would hit more protected winners.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long produced 38 trades and $1497.9 with median hold under 5 minutes, but owns the -513.4 global worst MAE. The worst tail had ES-VWAP distance 26.69, pullback-from-high 9.25, rolling-high distance 14.25, weak RSI/ADX warnings, and missed the extended-VWAP rejection veto only because max-vwap-distance was 26.25.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Extended-VWAP Near-Miss Tail Repair
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The same extended-above-VWAP regime contains protected fast winners, so widening the veto too far can suppress real edge. This micro-nudge should be rejected if protected extended-VWAP winner retention falls below 95% or total net profit drops below 98% of run_029.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm_pin_pullback_long or related pullback entries already matching the extended-VWAP rejection signature except for a slightly too-tight max ES-VWAP distance boundary.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves from -513.4 toward <= -403, charm_pin_pullback_long retains >=90% PnL, protected extended-VWAP winner retention >=95%, total net profit >=98% of run_029, completed trades stay within 10%, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: The worst charm-pin tail reached meaningful profit only after about 80 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners generally resolve quickly; static config cannot directly express early post-entry progress.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Path-aware logic can overfit a small tail sample and block clean high-extension winners unless validated against protected winner UTCS and out-of-sample days.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of run_029, and slow_12h = 0.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: Short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only sample over about 12.3 calendar days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the true risk is hidden MAE, long capital tie-u...
